headline: A Look At Marriott International (MAR) Valuation After Strong Recent Shareholder Returns
summary: Marriott International (MAR) has drawn attention after recent share price moves, with the stock showing gains over the past month and the past three months while also posting mixed short term daily and weekly returns. See our latest analysis for Marriott International. Zooming out, Marriott International’s recent 10.58% 1 month share price return and 14.71% 3 month share price return sit alongside a 49.67% 1 year total shareholder return, which points to firmly positive momentum rather than a...
